rationale: Educ. Code §29.157 governs Ready to Read Grants funded from appropriated funds. It has no dependency on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption levels or property tax revenue.
quote: From funds appropriated for the purpose, the commissioner shall make grants as provided by this section in support of pre-reading instruction.
_note: No direct or indirect linkage between homestead exemption amounts and this grant program's funding or operation.
